name: Bottle Storm: Elite Beach
description: Step into the ultimate tactical shooting range in Bottle Storm: Elite Beach! Aim carefully, break bottles, and avoid dangerous red bottles as you climb levels. Unlock new weapons, improve your reflexes, and master the beach arena. Can you reach the highest score without missing too many targets? Test your skill in this fast-paced, addictive arcade shooter!
instructions: Desktop Mouse Aim and shoot bottles Left Click Shoot Mobile Touch Tap Touch Shoot at bottles Drag finger Move crosshair optional auto-follow
